sections.paragraph:
verb לבקוע

to break, cleave, split; penetrate; hatched

verb להיבקע

be split, cleft; hatched; conquered

verb לבקע

to cleave, split; to tear to pieces

verb בוקע

be cleft, split; be torn to pieces

verb להתבקע

be split, broken open, burst

verb להבקיע

penetrate, pierce; seize, capture; score goal

verb הובקע

be penetrated; seized, captured; scored goal

verb לבקע (>>ביקע)

to cleave, split; to tear to pieces

masculine noun

fissure, breach, gap, split; rift; rupture; hernia
